coach_notes: The most critical gaps are classroom management, child development, and lesson planning, as these are foundational for roles in pediatric or school-based healthcare settings where you'd need to structure educational activities and manage groups of children. Without these, you may lack the skills to effectively engage young patients in therapeutic or developmental programs. To address this, consider taking a short online course in early childhood education or volunteering in a classroom to gain hands-on experience.

jobs.title: Internships / Volunteer Opportunities!
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your extensive volunteer and aide experience aligns perfectly with internship/volunteer opportunities. Your caregiving background demonstrates reliability and compassion.
jobs.gaps: May need to clarify specific interests or skills for certain roles; no major gaps for general volunteer work.

jobs.title: Trainer I
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your home health and caregiving experience shows you can handle patient interactions, and your familiarity with Epic is a plus for healthcare training roles. Your volunteer and aide background demonstrates patience and instructional ability.
jobs.gaps: No formal training or teaching experience; may need to develop curriculum delivery skills and knowledge of adult learning principles.

jobs.title: SY 26/27 PreK - 4th Grade Paraprofessional
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your experience assisting and caring for individuals, especially in home health, translates well to supporting young children in a classroom. Your volunteer work shows commitment to helping others.
jobs.gaps: No direct experience in a school setting or with PreK-4th grade curriculum; may need to learn classroom management and educational support techniques.

jobs.title: Montessori Assistant Teacher: Louisville, KY
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your aide and assisting roles, along with home health care, provide a foundation for supporting children in a Montessori environment. Your patience and care skills are relevant.
jobs.gaps: No Montessori training or experience; may need to understand Montessori philosophy and methods. Also lacks formal early childhood education background.

jobs.title: School Age Child Care Site Coordinator E Syracuse-Minoa- Part Time
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your experience caring for others and assisting in home health shows you can handle responsibility and supervision, which is relevant for a site coordinator role.
jobs.gaps: No experience in school-age child care coordination, program management, or supervisory duties. May lack knowledge of licensing requirements and administrative tasks.
